creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Rene Ladan from comment #2)
Thank you very much for addressing this pr(1).
FWIW I will have no difficulty making this port
py3.x complaint within a week. But it seemed odd
to me that my (py2.x) ports were slated for removal
on 2020-03-01, when py2.x isn't slated for removal
until somewhere in 20201.

Thank you again for all your time,
and consideration.

--Chris
